meta.purpose: The remediation registry for the Alex HQ Self-Heal Loop (scripts/hq_self_heal.py). One entry per failure class: how to detect it (a named probe in the engine), whether Alex may fix it alone, and how to escalate what it can't. Data-driven so risk/enable/escalation text can be tuned (and /self-review can propose additions) without touching the engine.
meta.home: recovery-layer (#18) - the FIX half of the detect-only checker
meta.trigger: runs as part of every HQ update (after scripts/hq_harvest_push.py), Shaheen 2026-07-21

risk_classes.AUTO_SAFE: deterministic, reversible, no external side-effect (re-ship, re-push, recount) - run automatically, always read-back-verified; escalate if the verify fails, never retry
risk_classes.PROPOSE: a live mutation (workflow redeploy/reactivation, clearing a stuck flag) - queued to human-actions with a diagnosis, NEVER auto-run (Shaheen's autonomy boundary 2026-07-21)
risk_classes.HUMAN_ONLY: needs Shaheen's hands or credentials (phone HealthKit, OAuth) - queued as his to do

meta.rails: one remedy attempt per check per run; every action appended to system/heal-log.jsonl; a new fix graduates in by adding a probe function + an entry here (git-reversible).

checks.desc: stored infra.mcp_tools must equal the live `claude mcp list` connected-server count
checks.remedy: re-derive via hq_infra_harvest and re-push the mcp event
checks.escalate_fail: MCP count re-pushed but the summary still disagrees - the ingest webhook or summary API may be down

checks.desc: the 5 channel-B JSONs on the box (/opt/alex-hq-data) must be fresh (mtime within 15 min of a harvest)
checks.remedy: re-scp the locally-built JSONs and re-verify each box mtime
checks.escalate_fail: box data files still stale after re-scp - SSH to the box is failing (key/agent) or the box is down

checks.desc: no active n8n workflow may be errored or silent past its cadence (n8n_broken_today = 0)
checks.remedy: redeploy from the repo mirror / reactivate - a live mutation, queued not auto-run

checks.desc: quota.anthropic_api red but system/quota-state.json says the cap is ok = a stale flag no early-reset path cleared (the 07-13 class). Ground truth is the state file, so this is auto-clearable.
checks.remedy: push a truthful corrective green + verify (only when quota-state.json state==ok; a real cap is left red)
checks.escalate_fail: quota red won't clear despite quota-state.json ok - ingest issue

checks.desc: if the health tiles are stalled the phone data source is dead - not machine-fixable
checks.remedy: check the iPhone Shortcut / HealthKit access

checks.desc: a project sitting red on run_status for >3 days with no fresh push - likely a stale flag a clean run never cleared
checks.remedy: confirm the project is actually healthy, then push a corrective green - queued (clearing needs per-project ground truth)

checks.desc: CATCH-ALL: any project red that no check above claims - never let a red light be silently ignored
checks.remedy: diagnose the red and either fix within the safe class or bring you the finding
